_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: NF1 muscle histology showed endomysial fibrosis and intramyocellular lipid by H&E and Oil Red O staining, respectively, consistent with prior findings
details: Quadriceps muscle histology showed endomysial fibrosis and intramyocellular lipid accumulation by H&E and Oil Red O staining
